step_rationale: Ferroptosis-related marker linked to AMI progression; tolerance factor.
mechanism: JDP2 regulates ferroptotic cardiomyocyte injury and post-MI immune tolerance programs.

references.title: Persistent transcriptional changes in cardiac adaptive immune cells following myocardial infarction: New evidence from the re-analysis of publicly available single cell and nuclei RNA-sequencing data sets.
references.journal: Journal of molecular and cellular cardiology

references.title: Identification and characterization of novel ferroptosis-related genes in acute myocardial infarction.
